case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VICTOR MANUEL LARA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED DEC-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $172.88 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN,INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL LARA SANCHEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $468.65 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA $1,255.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,360.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $780.33 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, VICTOR MANUEL LARA
